lint.command: echo "Checkstyle remains advisory in this review mission; treat the existing baseline as known debt and capture findings in docs/code-review/test-ci-governance.md."

blockingIssues.description: `remediation-backlog-synthesis` added `docs/code-review/remediation-backlog.md` without refreshing `docs/code-review/README.md`; the README still says the backlog is pending and does not link it, so current HEAD regresses VAL-CROSS-001's requirement that the review index link every produced artifact and reflect the final review structure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a docs-only review feature adds a new required artifact under `docs/code-review/` after synthesis/index files already exist, require the worker to update `docs/code-review/README.md` (and any related index files) in the same change so VAL-CROSS-001 stays true on milestone HEAD.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Commit `489da9c3736dd36ea6091fdc12c4bfcea7e1c443` added `docs/code-review/remediation-backlog.md` only; `README.md` still says the backlog is a remaining planned artifact and omits a link to it, which is the blocking issue in this scrutiny round.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a first-class manual fallback for reviewer fan-out failures: if `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents cannot launch because of model alias/runtime issues, inspect the handoffs, transcript skeletons, and diffs directly, then author the per-feature review JSON files in-session before continuing synthesis.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches for governance-review failed in this run with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`, so the reviews had to be completed manually in-session.
